caption: A man sits in a podcast setting, wearing a white baseball cap, headphones, and a black hoodie with gold lettering that reads "BOSS." He is positioned behind a dark table equipped with a professional microphone on a boom arm and a black gear bag. Behind him, a white backdrop features the repeated logo "UNICORN HUSTLE" accompanied by stars, while a blue sign above reads "'Where BOSSES Talk!'". To his right, a black container displays the text "TALK OUT YOUR GAME." Throughout the sequence, the man maintains a similar posture, leaning slightly forward with his arms crossed. His expression remains relatively consistent, though his gaze shifts slightly as he speaks or listens. The background and equipment remain static, with only subtle movements in the man's head and facial expressions as he engages in the conversation.
